headings: UNCONDITIONAL WAIVER AND RELEASE OF LIEN UPON FINAL PAYMENT
text: In consideration of the payments, the receipt and sufficiency of which Supplier acknowledges, the undersigned acknowledges the complete satisfaction of, and forever waives and releases, all claims of every kind that Supplier has or may have in connection with Subcontractor, Contractor, the Project and the Property and which could be asserted against the Project, the Property, Subcontractor, Contractor, Owner, any lender on the Project and all officers, shareholders, members, managers, directors, agents and employees of any of them. Contractor is specifically relying on the foregoing in its dealings with Owner.
